reviews.comment:
Lindo paraje y paisaje. Lo malo es que no tiene los suficientes surtidores para que la atencion sea rapida

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful setting and scenery. The downside is that it doesn't have enough gas pumps to provide quick service.

reviews.comment:
Es la última ypf saliendo x ruta 40 hacia el sur.... los baños deplorables, pero tienen de todos en el kiosco y no te matan con los precios de las naftas.

(Translated by Google)
It's the last YPF station heading south on Route 40... the bathrooms are deplorable, but they have everything at the convenience store and the gas prices aren't outrageous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReHBuZzh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso paisaje, aunque un poco lenta la atención...pero buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful scenery, although the service was a bit slow...but good service nonetheless.

reviews.comment:
buena atencion de los playeros  , caro el minimercado  te matan

(Translated by Google)
